input.description: Path to input DNA multi-FASTA file (up to 1000 headers).

outdir.description: Output directory for final and intermediate pipeline results.

max_cpus.description: Maximum CPUs available to the pipeline executor.

max_memory.description: Maximum memory available to pipeline processes.

max_time.description: Maximum walltime available to pipeline processes.

help.description: Print help text generated by nf-schema plugin.
